description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of light gray siding and reddish-brown brick accents, with large rectangular windows arranged in vertical and horizontal patterns. The front of the house includes a gated driveway, a small landscaped area with a tree, and a prominent entryway. The rear of the property boasts a private backyard with green lawn space and a small pool, enclosed by a dark fence for privacy. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a glass-roofed sunroom or atrium on the side. The overall structure is boxy and streamlined, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, multi-story urban house with flat roofs, large windows, brick and gray siding, and a private backyard with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, gated driveway, brick facade, and a landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light gray siding, vertical window arrangement, and a glass-roofed sunroom extending to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with green lawn, two small trees, and the fenced pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, additional entry access, and the backyard pool area with patio furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, brick surround, and a gated driveway with minimal decorative elements
